verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All my life I searched for the truth, I struggled deep inside I knew this life just wouldn't do. There was no comfort in some men's philosophy, I knew there must be more of His Word in store for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And then an eagle screamed, "Child, come out of her, I'll take you in My arms and lead you to the Word. Come on and spread your wings I'll teach you how to fly." I've been so happy since I heard God's eagle cry.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There I was in a nest of unbelief, Another empty heart was really all I could see; I needed something fresh to feed my hungry soul, I felt so out of place more of His wondrous grace I had to know.
